# Pull Request

## Summary

[One or two sentences — what does this PR change and why?]

## Type of change

- [ ] Specification edit (new or modified content)
- [ ] New ADR
- [ ] New RFC
- [ ] Governance change (process, panel, register)
- [ ] Diagram add or update
- [ ] Glossary update
- [ ] Repo hygiene (templates, READMEs, structure)
- [ ] Archive (retiring a legacy document)
- [ ] Other

## Specifications affected

[Which of the eight canonical specifications does this PR touch? If none, leave blank.]

## ADRs affected

[List any ADRs this PR creates, supersedes, or relies on.]

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I have read `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`
- [ ] If this changes a specification, I have followed `specs/_template.md`
- [ ] If this creates an ADR, I have used `decisions/_template.md`
- [ ] If this creates an RFC, I have used `rfcs/_template.md`
- [ ] If this adds a diagram, it is a source file (`.mmd` or `.puml`), not an image
- [ ] If this adds new terms, they are in `/glossary/`
- [ ] If this affects the document register, I have updated `governance/document-register.yaml`
- [ ] I have updated `CURRENT_STATE.md` if status has materially changed
- [ ] Cross-references to other specs and ADRs are explicit and correct

## Reviewer notes

[Anything specific you'd like reviewers to focus on, or questions you'd like resolved through the review.]
